race.comment: LOLLIES (10) has started the career in fine fashion with two wins and a placing from just three outings and looks the runner in this field with the most upside. Hard to knock fillies in form and rates as the one that they all have to run down. IDHANA (4) has placed over this track and trip, gets 3kg off with the claim and maps ideally for this contest from gate four. Ticks a few boxes. Former Victorian CRYOSEISMS (7) couldn't have been more impressive saluting at his first run for the new stable and will have derived a stack of confidence from that breakthrough victory. Top-three credentials. UNDERRATED (2) best of the rest while fresh.
